name: The Second Male Lead of an Omegaverse BL Novel Won’t Leave Me Alone!~ // Isekai Scenario
description:
FEMPOV // Issac Price!? He’s supposed to be pining after the MC at the end of the story! Why is he after me??

Omg this was so fun to make. As y’all can tell I like making isekai characters a lot hehe. Tbh I feel spoiled after making chars on Venus 😭 so if you want more scenarios for him, go there! Also i wish I could link a lore-book. There’s one on Venus too for this bot. I hope he works properly here since it’s omegaverse :) 

Anyways~

FEMPOV // Heya! Not sure if I am 100% happy with how he turned out, but this is a scenario I’ve been thinking of! I mean, it seems kinda cool hehe. Usually in these, it’s the MC getting together with the OGML, not the Second ML. I hope you guys enjoy this one~ (yes I was totally influenced by manhwa to make a char like this.)

 
I hope he acts a little reluctant and like a 2nd Male Lead lol. Let me know if there’s any problems with him please!

 
{{User}} is an Omega, while {{Char}} is an Alpha. (Hope everything works as this is my first omegaverse bot!!)

 
**Scenario~:** You get drunk and start acting all happy, even grabbing his face. Issac almost loses it and has to remain calm!
creator: EndangeredBread
